TOUR

X
VIP EXPERIENCE
TEDDY SWIMS 2025 VIP TOUR Package Includes:
  • One premium reserved or general admission ticket (where applicable)
  • Early entry into the venue (GA markets only)
  • Interactive Bad Dreams photo booth opportunity
  • Specially designed Teddy Swims tour shirt
  • Custom whiskey rocks ice set with case (exclusive to VIP only)
  • Limited edition Teddy Swims trading card
  • Exclusive Teddy Swims merchandise item
  • Commemorative laminate & lanyard
  • Limited availability
FAQ
What time should I arrive at the venue?
You should receive an email with all of the details regarding check in, at least 3 days before the show.
VIP Instructions will be emailed within a week of the show. To ensure you receive all notifications, please add info@onemoretimevip.com to your Safe Sender's list.
When and how will I receive my photos?
You will receive a detailed email at least 3 days before the show from info@onemoretimevip.com regarding photos and all details.
If you have any additional questions about your personal VIP experience, please email info@onemoretimevip.com.
X
EARLY ENTRY PREMIUM SEATING PACKAGE
Inclusions
  • One (1) A Reserve Seating ticket.
  • Early Entry pre-show merchandise shopping opportunity before public doors*.
  • One (1) Teddy Swims Limited Edition Tour Gift.
  • One (1) Commemorative Teddy Swims VIP Laminate and Lanyard.
  • Priority VIP check-in.
    • *Early Entry means you have priority access into the venue before all other ticketholders (excluding Early Entry General Admission Standing Package ticketholders who will be granted access to the venue at the same time).
EARLY ENTRY GENERAL ADMISSION STANDING PACKAGE
Inclusions
  • One (1) General Admission Standing ticket.
  • Early Entry pre-show merchandise shopping opportunity before public doors*.
  • Early Entry to the auditorium to secure your spot for the show.*
  • One (1) Teddy Swims Limited Edition Tour Gift.
  • One (1) Commemorative Teddy Swims VIP Laminate and Lanyard.
  • Priority VIP check-in.
    • *Early Entry means you have priority access into the venue before all other ticketholders (excluding Early Entry Premium Seating Package ticketholders who will be granted access to the venue at the same time). There is no sectioned off area on the floor (unless otherwise advised).
FAQ
Package Details and Instructions: All Early Entry Package purchasers will be contacted by email (to the email address submitted at the time of purchase) approximately 5 days before the concert. If you do not receive this email 5 days prior, please double check your junk email folder, and if you cannot locate any Early Entry Package communications, email VIP@frontiertouring.com
If you have questions or concerns regarding the delivery, collection, or contents, of your Early Entry Package inclusions, please email VIP@frontiertouring.com
